title: Prevent split-brain with terms and fencing
description: Use monotonic terms/epochs and fencing tokens so a stale leader cannot commit after a new leader is elected.
body: Use when any role grants exclusive authority (leader, lock holder, primary). Do not assume a node that thinks it is leader still is, and never let a leader act without proving its term. Actions: attach a monotonically increasing term/epoch to every leader action, require followers and storage to reject any request carrying a term lower than the highest seen, and pass that token to external resources as a fence. Validation signals include rejected writes from a deposed leader in a partition test and a single committed leader after partition heal. Risk boundary: a partitioned old leader that keeps writing causes silent data corruption; treat missing fencing on a critical write path as a high-severity gap and escalate.
